title: Political rally in Bagaha draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Bagaha promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Bagaha
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Bagaha constituency.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Bagaha
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Bagaha assembly segment.
